---
title: "Proyectos"
description: "Investigaciones activas y pasadas del semillero MetaCiencia"
toc: false
listing:
  id: projects-listing
  contents: "*.qmd"
  exclude:
    filename: "index.qmd"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  fields: [title, description, categories, date]
  sort: "date desc"
---

::: {#projects-listing}
:::
